Victory display may dedupe same-named Victory enemies: in RTG I defeated two separate Grave-Eaters (instance ec0007 then ec0008) plus Icy Ghoul, the return-Cellar location, and the Ghoul Priest. Final XP=5. One Grave-Eater appears NOT counted (expected 6 if both Grave-Eaters are Victory1 + Icy(1) + Cellar(1) + Priest(2)). Likely the engine adds a Victory enemy to the victory display by card name and skips a second defeated copy of the same name. Rule: each defeated Victory enemy should add its XP independently.

Parlor is unreachable from the Hallway move menu (confirmed again in this Agnes RTG game, also noted in Daisy game-07). After Act2 advances, Parlor is revealed as a Hallway connection but 'Move to Parlor' is never offered from Hallway (only Attic/Guest Hall/Cellar). This blocks the intended 3-clue Act2 route via Parlor and forces routing through Attic/Cellar. Should be a valid move target.
